codeReview.summary: The /actions route and sidebar wiring are present, but the prior blocking issue remains unresolved (tests do not validate the real component), and the page does not implement the required priority/date sort in runtime UI logic.

issues.description: Prior failed issue remains: the test suite is explicitly node/no-DOM and does not import or render ActionsPage. The only imports are vitest/types (lines 16-17), so required component behaviors in VAL-UI-014 are still not verified.
The Actions tab data pipeline is labeled 'Filter and sort' but only filters and returns result without sorting (line 425). Requirement calls for ordering by priority DESC then createdAt DESC.
ActionCardSkeleton is defined but never used, so the requested loading skeleton state for Actions cards is not currently reachable.

sharedStateObservations.observation: frontend-worker procedure requires agent-browser verification, but this worker session skipped that step while reporting followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md:53-60 requires manual agent-browser checks; worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for session 542acc2f-a777-4187-b673-d8923df88373 shows contains_agent_browser=False; handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Validation requires component tests, but project test setup is node-only and lacks React component testing tooling, encouraging helper-only tests.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: validation-contract.md:57-59 (VAL-UI-014 requires component tests); vitest.config.ts:6 uses environment='node'; package.json has no @testing-library/react entry.

summary: Review result: fail. Prior blocking test-coverage issue is still present, and the Actions page runtime logic also misses the required priority/date sort.
